allow: Bash(python -c "from data_loader import get_data; d = get_data\(\); progs = d['programs']; print\(f'Programs loaded: {len\(progs\)}'\); print\(f'Policy rules: {len\(d[\\"policy\\"][\\"rules\\"]\)}'\); print\(f'Special rules: {len\(d[\\"special_rules_index\\"]\)}'\); print\('First 3 programs:'\); [print\(' ', k\) for k in list\(progs.keys\(\)\)[:3]]")
